title_header: The God of High School, The Match With Gods Chapter 1, Episode 5. Story/Drawing by Yongje Park.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: It's a picture captured by satellite Robaire on April 8th.

dialogue.speaker: OBAMA
dialogue.line: To me, the President of the United States, it looks like a hand. What are your thoughts?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Well, that's...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Alert! Alert! Security guards enforced! Evacuation required immediately!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What happened?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: There's... there's an intruder! Repeat! Intruder alert! Intruder alert!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Don't you know where we are?! How can we have intruders?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: That's absurd! We're 120 floors down in the basement of the U.S. Pentagon! A place that's even safe from nuclear weapons!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: How many are there?! Have you identified who they are?

dialogue.speaker: MUJIN PARK
dialogue.line: That's... Greetings.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Who are you? Are you Chinese? Or Japanese?

dialogue.speaker: MUJIN PARK
dialogue.line: I apologize for barging in, but I have an urgent matter to discuss. My name is Mujin Park. I'm a member of the National Assembly of the Republic of Korea.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The COEX neighborhood of Samsung, Seoul. If you follow that staircase down into the basement, you'll find the place: Balhae Hall, COEX, The Ultimate Fighting King.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I can't believe there's a place like this in COEX. It's amazing.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hey, look! All the top fighters from Seoul are here!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hmm, that's Eisone Nah, the 'Yeongdeungpo Tiger.' He took over his whole district with his boxing skills.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: That guy is Dopak Lee, a transfer from Sindorim. He grew his back muscles by training with a sledgehammer, so it's a given that one punch equals three hits.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Dang! That dude came too! He's Seonemin Kim, the Knight of Yeonshinnae. Everyone's reluctant to fight him because he's so mean and violent! His martial arts technique is called the Praying Mantis.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Dopi Cha, 'The Bear,' who always blames other people's livers whenever he gets triggered.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: You know why you're being beaten? It's because you're weaker?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: That's Sansoo Nah, who suddenly gained super strength after eating the Cornus fruit. They're great for men.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Gosh, look over there! Oh my! What's a white rose doing among all these sweaty dudes? Haha! You shouldn't take her so lightly. She put Minseo Seo, the best fighter in Dongdaemun, totally out of commission.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Be quiet.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Okay.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What do you think?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: The number of recommended hours to sleep is only eight hours per day.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Isn't that too short? It's optimal for our mental health to sleep at least ten hours.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I agree.

dialogue.speaker: MORI JIN
dialogue.line: Thanks for your help earlier, Daewi Han.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: There's a lot of participants again this year. Which number do you think will win in this quarter from the Capital Branch?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: No. 41. How could an Executive Committee member let their arm be broken by a participant? I can't believe it. If I were you, I'd just go die now.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Both of you. Stop it right now.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: If you guys fight again like last time, I won't just sit and watch.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Anyway. No. 105... she's... a real monster.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Mic test! Mic test! Everybody, listen up!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: As you entered, you all received an injection and a bracelet.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: There are bio-nanoparticles in the injection you received. The nanoparticles in your blood vessels will act as a life support system. Simply put, you will not die after a fight.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Also, if you look at the bracelet we handed to you, it is called a 'Nano Technology Interface.' It receives and transmits information from the nanoparticles in your body. In other words, it will provide you information such as your physical stats, strength, and stamina levels. Also, keep in mind that you can receive others' information as well.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: By now, you should be able to check your own information.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Well, those are all the instructions for now. So, to all the participants who've gathered here: Fight each other, now!

summary: An intruder, Mujin Park, breaches the U.S. Pentagon to discuss an urgent matter. Meanwhile, participants gather at Balhae Hall for the God of High School tournament, where various powerful fighters are introduced, and the rules involving bio-nanoparticles for life support are explained before the fighting begins.
